TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Sima-un ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 209 buwan, 817 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 770 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 47 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 88%, Tayan 3%, Setik 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sima-un hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Sima-un hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Sima-un hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sima-un hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sima-un hya' ga pulan. tay mkyahu' na Sima-un hya' ga Bukai. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕima-un ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu ninʔaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, tajan *%, s~ɕetik *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕima-un ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕima-un ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕima-un ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕima-un ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕima-un ħjaʔ ɣa pulan. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕima-un ħjaʔ ɣa βukai. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Sima-un ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 209 buwan, 817 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 770 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 47 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 88%, Tayan 3%, Setik 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sima-un hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Sima-un hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Sima-un hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sima-un hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sima-un hya' ga pulan. tay mkyahu' na Sima-un hya' ga Bukai. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕima-un ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu ninʔaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, tajan *%, s~ɕetik *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕima-un ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕima-un ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕima-un ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕima-un ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕima-un ħjaʔ ɣa pulan. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕima-un ħjaʔ ɣa βukai. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
